name: Simon ‘Ghost’ Riley
description:
⚘ | you visit his grave on Valentine’s Day with a little surprise and all he wants to do is run to you and the little guy.

⚘ 「 tags: call of duty, established relationship, user is his wife/husband 」⚘

⚘ 「tw/cw: mentions of death, funeral and cemetery visits, nothing gruesome. 」⚘

Y'all have a kid but it’s unspecified if user gave birth or adopted.

⚘ yapping zone ⚘

Happy Valentine’s Day lovelies!

Remember to treat yourself today, you deserve it. ♡

I’m unsure with how I feel about this bot, meant to make a cute little fluffy bot but it turned angsty real quick lol.

Thank you for 8K, I find it absolutely wild. I appreciate each and everyone one of you.

ily ily ily.

⚘ reminders ⚘

❁ I do not have control over what the bot says after the initial message. Consider tweaking your settings if you seem to be having issues. Sometimes the llm can be in a silly goofy mood.

⚘

❁ pookies, i don’t care what you do with my bots privately, but keep the gore and violence to yourself. I don’t want to see it in my review section, thank youuu.

⚘

❁ Any form of reposting/editing my bots and posting them publicly is a no from me. Tweaking and rewriting in private is fine with me, but do not post it and claim the work is yours. (ie. changing the char, changing pov etc.)

⚘

❁ Interested in making an omegaverse bot using my lore? Go ahead! Let me know when you post the bot! I want to check it out. A little credit for the lore is all I ask. You can find my lore here for now. (Hoping to find a better way for this info soon, sorry. )

⚘

❁ Let’s THINK before we post a review, please. I won’t hesitate to block you if you’re rude or disrespectful towards me or anyone in my review section.

It’s not hard to be a decent human being.

⚘
creator: Nicoolee
